summary: Comprehensive testing of ICEN (International Council for Emerging Nations) website completed. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all pages, navigation, multi-step application form, admin login/dashboard, and auth protection. The Three.js globe renders correctly. Email notifications are implemented but Resend free tier limits sending to verified email only (expected behavior, doesn't block submissions).
critical_code_review_comments: Email notifications use Resend free tier which only allows sending to verified email (sarfrazkhan416@gmail.com). For production, a verified domain is needed.
Admin seeding is idempotent - verified by backend logs showing password re-sync capability
seed_data_creation: Test applications created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_icen_api.py cover all API endpoints. Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements. Email notifications are best-effort async and don't block submissions.

backend.POST /api/applications: PASS - Creates application, returns 200 with id, stores in MongoDB
backend.POST /api/applications validation: PASS - Invalid email returns 422, short motivation returns 422
backend.POST /api/auth/login (correct): PASS - Returns access_token and user object
backend.GET /api/admin/stats: PASS - Returns {total, pending, reviewing, approved, rejected}
backend.PATCH /api/admin/applications/{id}/statu: PASS - Updates status, returns updated doc

frontend.Home page: PASS - Hero with Three.js globe, stats, pillars (12), regions (8), membership tiers (4), CTA
frontend.Apply flow: PASS - Multi-step form (Identity -> Profile -> Motivation -> Review) submits successfully with reference ID
frontend.Admin dashboard: PASS - Stats, applications table, filters, search, detail drawer, status update buttons

email_notifications.status: Implemented but limited by Resend free tier
email_notifications.note: Resend free tier only allows sending to verified email (sarfrazkhan416@gmail.com). For production, verify a domain at resend.com/domains. Emails are sent async and don't block application submission.
